nodes.name: .pre-commit-config.yaml
nodes.summary: Pre-commit hook configuration wiring ruff linting and formatting into the git commit workflow.

nodes.name: AGENTS.md
nodes.summary: AI-assistant development guidelines covering chain-of-thought reasoning, verification workflow, anti-bloat rules, and project conventions for agents working on abersetz.

nodes.name: CHANGELOG.md
nodes.summary: Accumulative release notes documenting feature additions, fixes, and version history of abersetz.

nodes.name: CLAUDE.md
nodes.summary: Claude-specific development guidelines, near-identical to AGENTS.md, defining CoT reasoning, verification, and anti-overcomplication rules.

nodes.name: DEPENDENCIES.md
nodes.summary: Lists the project's package dependencies with rationale for why each was chosen.

nodes.name: GEMINI.md
nodes.summary: Gemini-specific development guidelines, near-identical to AGENTS.md/CLAUDE.md, defining AI collaboration conventions.

nodes.name: IDEA.md
nodes.summary: Conceptual notes and original idea sketch describing the motivation and high-level design of abersetz.

nodes.name: LLXPRT.md
nodes.summary: LLxprt-specific development guidelines, near-identical to AGENTS.md, defining AI collaboration conventions.

nodes.name: QWEN.md
nodes.summary: Qwen-specific development guidelines, near-identical to AGENTS.md, defining AI collaboration conventions.

nodes.name: README.md
nodes.summary: Project overview explaining what abersetz does, with usage examples for translating directories of text and Markdown files via AI engines.

nodes.name: SPEC.md
nodes.summary: Technical specification describing the architecture, pipeline stages, and engine interfaces of abersetz.

nodes.name: TASKS.md
nodes.summary: Detailed future goals and planned work for abersetz with specific implementation specifics.

nodes.name: TESTING.md
nodes.summary: Testing strategy and instructions covering unit, integration, and functional example-based tests.

nodes.name: TODO.md
nodes.summary: Flat itemized checklist representation of the TASKS.md roadmap.

nodes.name: WORK.md
nodes.summary: Work progress log capturing iteration notes, test results, and next steps across the development of abersetz.

nodes.name: package.toml
nodes.summary: Project scaffolding configuration toggling CLI, logging, Pydantic, Rich, VCS, and GitHub Actions features.

nodes.name: pyproject.toml
nodes.summary: Python project manifest defining build system (hatch-vcs), dependencies, CLI entry point, and tool configuration (ruff, pytest, mypy).

nodes.name: build.sh
nodes.summary: Build script that lints, formats, runs tests, and builds the abersetz package via uv/hatch.

nodes.name: install.sh
nodes.summary: Installation script performing an editable local install of abersetz via uv pip.

nodes.name: publish.sh
nodes.summary: Release script that cleans builds, runs build.sh and install.sh, tags the next version, and publishes the package to PyPI.
